## Summary

One or two sentences on what this PR does and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests` clean
- [ ] `uv run mypy --strict src` clean
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] `README.md` updated if the user-facing interface changed
- [ ] If this changes the run-JSON schema, `harness diff` output
      format, grader API, or target binding shape — linked issue
      with prior design discussion: #
